summary:
Root cause analysis of two pipeline bottlenecks:

1. Verify Loop: Re-splits produce identical marker positions because marker-based splitting is deterministic. The AI returns the same start_markers because the text boundaries haven't changed. ~6.5 minutes wasted per run.

2. Audit Outline JSON fail: The prompt requires the AI to echo back the entire outline (~5-10KB JSON) alongside audit_issues. Flash model generates malformed JSON for such large outputs. ~10 minutes wasted per run.

Fixes proposed: (1) Compare chapter positions before re-verifying to detect no-ops. (2) Split audit into 2 passes — first detect issues (small output), then fix outline only if needed.
